body.title: Build skill violation logger + outcome store
body.result: append_violation/append_outcome/top_violations/skill_outcome_trend/monthly_rollup added to skill_telemetry.py; JSONL storage; 12 tests pass
body.description:
Build violation logger + outcome store: the infrastructure that skill executions emit to, and the rollup query that surfaces reinforcement targets.

**Proposed shape:**
- lab/claudecode/skill_telemetry.py gains: append_violation(), append_outcome(), top_violations(n, days), skill_outcome_trend(skill, days)
- Storage: IGOR_HOME/claudecode/violation_log.jsonl + outcome_log.jsonl (JSONL, append-only)
- monthly_rollup() returns top N forget-flags by frequency, sorted by recurrence

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/skill_telemetry.py (extend), no new files
**Design rules:** no-sqlite, docs-live-in-code
**Scope boundary:** Logger + query only; does not retrofit skills or modify SKILL.md files
**Test plan:** Unit tests for append/query round-trip; test top_violations with fixture data
